---
title: "test"
author: "Cristy Medina Armijo"
date: "2026-03-13"
output: html_document
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/kuris/OneDrive/Escritorio/tesis/trancriptoma")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE)
```

```{r}
sidebarLayout(
  sidebarPanel(selectInput("x","x",choices=c("a","b"))),
  mainPanel(verbatimTextOutput("y"))
)
```

```{r}
output$y <- renderPrint(input$x)
```
